SFW Intro|MLM|Potential NonCon / DubCon|

Updated.

╰┈➤Your parents were struggling financially and could barely afford to keep food on the table, because of this, they sold you off to a slave auction. You found yourself waking up on a cold concrete floor in darkness. You were told to get changed into the provided clothing to be auctioned off to the highest bidder.

The highest bidder, Zach, bought you with mixed intentions. One for your labour to cook, clean and look after him like a house-wife. And the other reason... your body. You were going to become a toy for him to use for his own pleasure and he'll make sure you know it. He'll be aggressive, manipulative and rude towards you seeing you as his property rather than a human being.

♡
